description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic device with a slanted front control panel featuring several rotary dials, toggle switches, and indicator lights. The front panel is labeled with various control functions and includes a prominent green power button. The top and sides of the device have a textured, matte finish, while the rear panel is equipped with multiple ports, connectors, and ventilation grilles, suggesting it is designed for interfacing with other equipment. The rear also displays a label with technical information and blue-colored connectors, likely for data or power connections. The overall construction appears robust, with a metal or hard plastic casing, and the device is likely used for specialized electrical or measurement tasks in an urban or industrial setting. Its size and features indicate it is intended for stationary use on a desktop or workbench.
description: A boxy electronic device with a slanted control panel, rotary dials, switches, and multiple rear connectors, housed in a textured, robust casing.
description_view_0: The front and top of the device are visible, showing the control panel with dials, switches, and a green power button.
description_view_1: The rear and one side are visible, highlighting multiple blue and black connectors, ports, and a technical label.
description_view_2: A direct view of the rear panel, showing all connectors, ports, and the main label in detail.
description_view_3: The front and opposite side are visible, again showing the control panel and side ventilation grilles.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary dials, toggle switches
